arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti reveals what is to blame for Real Madrid injury crisis
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti has blamed the "too demanding" football calendar for the club's growing injury problems, calling for the number of games to be reduced. "We've looked at what we can do, but it's out of our hands," he suggested this week as Madrid prepare to begin the new eight-game Champions League 'league phase'.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'plotting' ambitious triple transfer raid on Premier League
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly eyeing up the capture of three Premier League stars ahead of the upcoming transfer windows in January and the summer of 2025.

arts.ttl: “Nothing more to say” – Man City ace conveniently dodges questions about reported Real Madrid interest
arts.sum: Man City begin their 2024/25 Champions League campaign with a classic fixture against the team they overcame in the 2023 final to win the treble; Inter Milan. It is one of a host of first night fixtures that sees two of European football’s biggest sides going head to head. arts.ttl: Champions League: Kylian Mbappe is ominous for pretenders to Real Madrid's crown
arts.sum: World’s best player makes current holders even stronger

arts.ttl: Real Madrid plan SENSATIONAL transfer raid of top Premier League stars
arts.sum: According to the Independent, Real will target moves for Trent Alexander-Arnold, with his contract at Liverpool set to expire next summer, as well as Manchester City defensive midfielder Rodri . Alexander-Arnold to headline Real transfer plans

arts.ttl: A Champions League first for Real Madrid on Tuesday
arts.sum: Los Blancos will take on Bundesliga side VfB Stuttgart in the elite competition on Tuesday 17 September (3pm ET) at the Estadio Santiago Bernabéu in what will be the first time ever the two teams have met in continental football. VfB Stuttgart are heading into the Champions League after finishing second in the Bundesliga last season, with Serhou Guirassy - who now plays for Borussia Dortmund - scoring 28 league goals.

arts.ttl: Why aren’t Alaba and Camavinga playing for Real Madrid against Stuttgart in the Champions League game 1?
arts.sum: Both Eduardo Camavinga and David Alaba, as well as Brahim Díaz, are set to miss out on the game against their German opponents at the Estadio Santiago Bernabéu due to injury. The injury crisis to Carlo Ancelotti’s Real Madrid side continues, and the Spanish side are set to get their Champions League campaign underway against VfB Stuttgart (Tuesday 17 September, 3pm ET) without a number of important figures in the side.

arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe shows true colours with reaction to being subbed for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappe is settling into life at the Bernabeu after his blockbuster summer switch from PSG, and his actions after being subbed off for Real Madrid speak volumes about him

arts.ttl: The reason why Real Madrid remain confident of landing Liverpool’s Trent Alexander-Arnold
arts.sum: Speculation would appear to be rife concerning Trent Alexander Arnold’s continued employment with Liverpool Football Club. The 25-year-old England international has yet to commit to a contract beyond his current one, which is set to expire at the end of the current campaign. arts.ttl: Real Madrid target Trent Alexander-Arnold and three other Premier League stars to start ambitious transfer era
arts.sum: The European champions are preparing to go big next summer after half a decade of financial realignment
